number.description: The order of this tier within the curriculum.

title.description: The name of the curriculum tier.

slug.description: A URL-friendly identifier for the tier, typically derived from the title.

tagline.description: A short, catchy phrase that summarizes the tier.

description.description: A detailed description of the tier's content and goals.

color.description: A hex code representing the color associated with this tier.

estimatedTime.description: An estimate of how long it will take to complete this tier.

min.description: The minimum estimated time in hours.

max.description: The maximum estimated time in hours.

units.description: The units for the estimated time.

prerequisites.description: A list of prerequisites for this tier.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with this tier.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of this tier.

certificate.description: Indicates whether completing this tier grants a certificate.
